ops.body: Lesson from the fleet sweep for the v0.41.0 scaffold: the install-binary layout must map the PINNED/LATEST choice to the matching shared fragment — cc-skills:install-binary-pinned vs cc-skills:install-binary-latest (the v1 template's {{#PINNED}}/{{#LATEST}} switch). Do NOT default everything to latest: cc-review + cc-runtime are pinned-mode, and release.yml's verify-plugin-version contract in pinned repos depends on it. Repos whose script has diverged beyond the shared body (cc-context: ensure_rg + migration shim) use a repo-LOCAL fragment instead of an import — the scaffold should support both shapes.
